steps.title: F…õn f…îl…î min b…õ k…õ: La…≤ini ni Ihram

steps.title: F…õn filanan: Ka don Al-Masjid Al-Haram k…în…î

steps.title: Taabolo sabanan: Tawaf (circuit wolonwula).

steps.title: Taabolo w…î…îr…înan: Aw b…õ kunsigi tig…õ walima ka a kunsigi tig…õ
steps.details:
• C…õw b…õ u kunsigi tig…õ walima k‚Äôu tig…õ, musow b…õ a y…îr…î fitinin d…î tig…õ.

steps.title: F…õn f…îl…î: Ihram ani Haji ≈ãaniya
